_schema.description: Retrograde (vakri) planets in Vedic astrology indicate karmic patterns from past lives, internalized energy, or unfinished business. They make the planet's energy turn inward.
_schema.usage: Add retrograde modifiers to base planet interpretations. Note: Sun and Moon never retrograde in Vedic; Rahu/Ketu always retrograde.

psychological_meaning: anger turned inward instead of outward
may bottle up energy until explosion
courage exists but is questioned internally
feels powerless externally even when capable
mars_retrograde.relationship_pattern: Passive-aggressive tendencies, may not assert needs
mars_retrograde.career_pattern: May undermine own ambitions, restart careers
mars_retrograde.spiritual_lesson: Learning to channel energy outward in healthy ways
mars_retrograde.remedies: Hanuman Chalisa, Mars mantras, physical exercise to release

psychological_meaning: may have learning style that doesn't fit norms
mercury_retrograde.relationship_pattern: Communication may take time to develop in relationships
mercury_retrograde.career_pattern: Better at editing/reviewing than first drafts; technical/research work suits
mercury_retrograde.spiritual_lesson: Trust inner voice over external validation
mercury_retrograde.remedies: Mercury mantras, study scriptures, journal writing

psychological_meaning: wisdom comes from within, not external gurus
jupiter_retrograde.relationship_pattern: Spouse may not match traditional expectations; values matter more than appearance
jupiter_retrograde.career_pattern: May reject conventional success markers; finds own path
jupiter_retrograde.spiritual_lesson: True wisdom comes from inner experience, not adopted beliefs
jupiter_retrograde.remedies: Guru mantras, scripture self-study, charity to teachers

psychological_meaning: feels older than peers from childhood
may avoid responsibility externally but feels burdened internally
saturn_retrograde.relationship_pattern: Slow to commit, fears emotional duty
saturn_retrograde.career_pattern: Long delays before breakthroughs; karmic work themes
saturn_retrograde.remedies: Shani mantras, service to elderly/poor, Saturday fasting

psychological_meaning: attracted to unusual partners or arrangements
may struggle with self-worth in love
venus_retrograde.relationship_pattern: Relationships restart, ex-lovers return; unconventional bonds
venus_retrograde.spiritual_lesson: Love must be redefined personally, not socially
venus_retrograde.remedies: Shukra mantras, Friday gifts to women, art creation

psychological_meaning: past life desires manifesting as obsessions
rahu_retrograde.remedies: Durga mantras, donate to outcasts, Saturn-related charities

psychological_meaning: carries past life skills as natural abilities
